---
title: Projects/Tools
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-shell page-shell-inner">
  <section class="section reveal">
    <div class="section-heading">
      <p class="eyebrow">Projects/Tools</p>
      <h2>R, tooling, and a few small experiments</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="split-text">
      <p>
        A growing part of my work is building internal tooling that makes statistical workflows
        more robust, more efficient, and easier to operationalize. That includes R packages, Shiny
        applications, and other tools that support real-world evidence generation in practice.
      </p>
      <p>
        This page will eventually hold more concrete examples. For now, it acts as a placeholder
        for the kinds of work I care about most: durable analysis infrastructure, better scientific
        workflows, and thoughtful uses of AI alongside strong statistical judgment.
      </p>
    </div>
  </section>
</div>
```
